Collection.title: Collection
Collection.description: A data collection (cohort) containing tasks, distributions and host relationship metadata.

CollectionActivityLog.title: CollectionActivityLog
CollectionActivityLog.description: Activity log entry for collection-level events or task runs

CollectionConfig.title: CollectionConfig
CollectionConfig.description: Configuration settings for scheduled distribution runs for a Collection

run_time_hour.description: Hour of day for distribution run (0-23)

run_time_minute.description: Minute of hour for distribution run (0-59)

CollectionConfigRun.title: CollectionConfigRun
CollectionConfigRun.description: Represents an execution run of a CollectionConfig - records the query and task run details

query_id.description: FK to the saved query executed (if any)

task_id.description: Associated task id for the run

errors.description: Error details if the run failed

CollectionHostHasCollection.title: CollectionHostHasCollection
CollectionHostHasCollection.description: A pivot model linking a CollectionHost to a Collection

ConceptSet.title: ConceptSet
ConceptSet.description: A user-defined set of concepts (used for query building / cohort definitions).

user_id.description: FK to the user who owns the concept set

domain.description: OMOP domain for the concepts in this set

concepts.description: List of concepts within this set

ConceptSetHasConcept.title: ConceptSetHasConcept
ConceptSetHasConcept.description: Pivot linking a concept to a ConceptSet

CustodianNetworkHasCustodian.title: CustodianNetworkHasCustodian
CustodianNetworkHasCustodian.description: Pivot linking a CustodianNetwork to a Custodian

Distribution.title: Distribution
Distribution.description: A distribution (result) produced from running a query on a collection (e.g., a count or measurement summary).

task_id.description: FK to task that produced this distribution

category.description: Category for the distribution (e.g. DEMOGRAPHICS, MEASUREMENT)

DistributionConcept.title: DistributionConcept
DistributionConcept.description: A denormalised representation of a concept within a distribution; used for exporting and reporting distribution concepts.

Job.title: Job
Job.description: Represents an enqueued background job (queue payload and metadata).

collection_id.description: FK to related collection if applicable

queue.description: Name of the queue the job belongs to

payload.description: Serialized payload for the queued job (JSON string)

reserved_at.description: Timestamp when job was reserved (processing started)

available_at.description: Timestamp when job becomes available for processing

collection.description: Optional collection relationship, if the job is related to a collection

LocalConceptAncestor.title: LocalConceptAncestor
LocalConceptAncestor.description: Represents an ancestor/descendant relationship between OMOP concepts, used to map hierarchy within local concept dataset.

parent_concept_id.description: OMOP concept_id of the ancestor/parent concept

child_concept_id.description: OMOP concept_id of the descendant/child concept

NlpQueryLog.title: NlpQueryLog
NlpQueryLog.description: Records of user-submitted natural language queries and the NLP-extracted entities returned for logging/diagnostics.

nlp_extracted.description: JSON-serialized NLP entities extracted from the query

user_id.description: FK to the user who submitted the query

definition.description: Structured query definition (array of rule objects)

RequestAudit.title: RequestAudit
RequestAudit.description: Records of incoming HTTP requests for auditing and diagnostics.

user_id.description: FK to the authenticated user (if any)

method.description: HTTP method used by the request

Result.title: Result
Result.description: Result record produced from running a task (counts, metadata and status).

task_id.description: FK to the Task that produced this result

collection_id.description: FK to the Collection this result is associated with (if any)

metadata.description: JSON metadata describing the result (statistics, parameters, etc.)

ResultFile.title: ResultFile
ResultFile.description: Represents a file produced from a result export or processing task.

pid.description: Public identifier for the result file

task_id.description: FK to the Task that created this file

collection_id.description: FK to the Collection related to this file

path.description: File system path to the file

file_description.description: Human readable description of the file

rows_processed.description: Number of rows processed/written to the file

Task.title: Task
Task.description: A background processing task that executes a saved query against a collection.

collection_id.description: FK to the collection the task targets

resultFiles.description: Optional files produced by the task

TaskRun.title: TaskRun
TaskRun.description: Logs when tasks have been attempted.

worker_id.description: Worker id returned by BUNNY via the request and/or IP address

attempt.description: Number of the attempt made so far

UserHasRole.title: UserHasRole
UserHasRole.description: Pivot model linking a User to a Role

UserHasWorkgroup.title: UserHasWorkgroup
UserHasWorkgroup.description: Pivot linking a User to a Workgroup

WorkgroupHasCollection.title: WorkgroupHasCollection
WorkgroupHasCollection.description: Pivot linking a workgroup to a collection.

tags.description: API Endpoints for managing custodian networks

tags.description: Endpoints for managing saved queries and query downloads

tags.name: Query Parsing
tags.description: Endpoints for parsing natural language queries into structured rules

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Endpoints for managing and retrieving background processing tasks

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Endpoints for managing users and their workgroup memberships
